title: Sieversia triflora
taxonomy: Sieversia triflora is classified within the family Rosaceae, which is a large and diverse family of flowering plants. This family includes many well-known species, such as roses, apples, and pears. The genus Sieversia is typically classified as a subgenus within the genus Potentilla. This classification suggests a close relationship between Sieversia triflora and other species within the Potentilla genus.
